script:
set +e
echo '=== recent per-user bot OUTBOUND (proof they ARE/are NOT replying) ==='
for u in afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily gabriel heather jesusr jose kaye lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid; do
  d=/home/$u/.${u}-bot
  # neil-claude / stephanie-claude / emily-claude / jesus-reyes naming exceptions
  for alt in "$d" "/home/$u/.${u}-claude-bot" "/home/$u/.${u}-reyes-bot"; do
    if [ -d "$alt" ]; then
      latest=$(ls -t "$alt"/outbound.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1)
      if [ -n "$latest" ]; then
        ts=$(tail -1 "$latest" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.loads(sys.stdin.read()).get("ts","none"))' 2>/dev/null)
        echo "$u last_outbound=$ts ($latest)"
        break
      fi
    fi
  done
done
echo '=== last 5 errors for aixa (real path) ==='
tail -5 /home/aixa/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1
echo '=== same for alejandro ==='
tail -5 /home/alejandro/.alejandro-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1
echo '=== test actual systemd service of aixa: status + journal last 5 lines ==='
systemctl status aixa-responder.service --no-pager 2>&1 | head -15
journalctl -u aixa-responder.service -n 5 --no-pager 2>&1
echo '===END==='
